message.content:
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam classFontColor black
skinparam classBackgroundColor #F5F5F5

skinparam classHeaderBorderColor black
skinparam classIconSize 20
skinparam classIconColor #4CAF50

skinparam classIconFontColor #1B5E20
skinparam classIconFontName "Arial"
skinparam classIconFontSize 14
skinparam classIconFontStyle bold
skinparam classIconFontWeight bold
skinparam classIconFontDecoration none
skinparam classIconFontUnderline false
skinparam classIconFontStrike false
skinparam classIconFontItalic false
skinparam classIconFontBold true
skinparam classIconFontNormal false

skinparam classIconFontLight false

skinparam classIconFontFullName "Arial"
skinparam classIconFontDisplayName "Arial"
skinparam classIconFontLocalName "Arial"
skinparam classIconFontPostScriptName "Arial"
skinparam classIconFontUnicodeName "Arial"
skinparam classIconFontVariationName "Arial"
skinparam classIconFontStyleName "Regular"
skinparam classIconFontWeightName "Regular"
skinparam classIconFontStretchName "Normal"
skinparam classIconFontWidthName "Normal"

skinparam classIconFontOrientationName "Upright"

skinparam classIconFontSkewName "0"

skinparam classIconFontKerningName "Auto"

skinparam classIconFontFeatureName "Standard"
skinparam classIconFontVariantName "Normal"
skinparam classIconFontCaseName "Normal"

skinparam classIconFontFillName "Solid"
skinparam classIconFontGradientName "None"

skinparam classIconFontTextureName "None"
skinparam classIconFontImageName "None"
skinparam classIconFontVideoName "None"
skinparam classIconFontAudioName "None"
skinparam classIconFontAnimationName "None"
skinparam classIconFontScriptName "None"
skinparam classIconFontStyleSet "Regular"
skinparam classIconFontWeightSet "Regular"

skinparam classIconFontWidthSet "Normal"

skinparam classIconFontOrientationSet "Upright"

class Project {
}
class User {
}
class Admin {
}
class Author {
}
class Editor {
}
class Submission {
}
class Revision {
}
class Resource {
}
class Document {
}
class AudioFile {
}
class Video {
}
class Comment {
}

Project "1" *-- "1" Submission
Project "1" *-- "1" Resource
Project "1" o-- "*" User

User <|-- Admin
User <|-- Author
User <|-- Editor

Submission "1" *-- "1" Comment
Submission "1" *-- "*" Revision
Submission "1" o-- "1" Author

Revision "1" o-- "1" Editor
Revision "1" o-- "1" Resource

Resource <|-- Document
Resource <|-- AudioFile
Resource <|-- Video

Author "1" --> "1*" Comment
Editor "1" --> "1" Comment

@enduml
